title: Verify and fix AC1 dashboard scale regression report

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Verified cited path: accuracy evaluation alignment payload already mapped via _format_alignment_metric_value. Found remaining inconsistency in feedback evaluation path where Alignment AC1 was still sent raw [-1,1]. Updated that payload path to the same formatter for [0,100] compatibility.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Validation: .venv/bin/pytest -q plexus/Evaluation_feedback_test.py -k alignment_metric_to_percentage -> 1 passed; .venv/bin/pytest -q tests/cli/test_evaluation_scoreversion_association.py -k AlignmentFormatting -> 4 passed.
